summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Match&Live JWT authentication system. All major authentication features working correctly including user registration, login, profile management, property saving, and dashboard functionality. Minor issue with brute force protection not triggering lockout.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: After 5 failed login attempts, should return 429 but continues returning 401
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Authentication still works correctly, just missing lockout feature

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/register - creates user with complete profile fields
POST /api/auth/login - authenticates user and sets httpOnly cookies
GET /api/auth/me - returns current user from cookie authentication
PUT /api/auth/profile - updates user profile fields correctly
POST /api/saved/{id} - saves property for authenticated user
Login page renders and login flow works with redirect to dashboard
Register page renders with all profile fields and registration flow works
Dashboard shows user profile info with edit capability
Dashboard saved tab shows empty state and saved properties correctly
Header shows Entrar/Registrate when not logged in
Header shows user avatar when logged in
Logout from dashboard works and redirects to home
Save button on property cards works when authenticated
Profile editing functionality works with all fields
Property save/unsave functionality integrated with dashboard
Authentication state properly managed across page navigation
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix brute force protection - the lockout mechanism after 5 failed login attempts is not working. Check IP detection logic and MongoDB login_attempts collection setup.
